nasb.text: The silver of those of the congregation who were numbered was 100 talents and 1,775 shekels, according to the shekel of the sanctuary;

esv.text: The silver from those of the congregation who were recorded was a hundred talents and 1,775 shekels, by the shekel of the sanctuary:

cnv.text: 會眾中被數點的人所出的銀子，按照聖所的標準，共有三千四百三十公斤。

ccb.text: 按圣所的秤计算，从登记的人口所收到的银子是三点四二吨。
